data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the integration of the 'Now Serving' audio announcement, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this feature. The absence of any API reads or persisted state checks related to the audio announcement integration indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of 'Now Serving' audio announcement integration provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
